title: Microsoft Graph API - OAuth2 Client Credentials Flow

confirmed_facts.fact: Required body params: client_id, client_secret, scope=https://graph.microsoft.com/.default, grant_type=client_credentials
Response includes token_type, expires_in (~3599 seconds), and access_token
Use header 'Authorization: Bearer {access_token}' for all Graph API calls
Scope MUST be 'https://graph.microsoft.com/.default' — not a specific permission scope

implementation_notes: Cache token and refresh before expiry (expires_in is ~3599s)
Client secret must NEVER be hardcoded — use environment variable or secure config
Application ID and Tenant ID can be in config but secret must be separate
caveats: This is the app-only (daemon) flow — no user interaction. Requires admin consent for the requested permissions.
The .default scope requests all permissions that have been admin-consented for the app registration.
